repo.description: MemSkill: Learning and Evolving Memory Skills for Self-Evolving Agents

QS-04_issue_health.detail: 5 open issues, all questions. No triage.

QS-05_pr_throughput.detail: No PR activity. Direct pushes to main.

QS-10_documentation.detail: README 360 lines, paper linked, setup instructions.

QS-11_ci_quality.detail: Only pages deployment. No test CI.

QS-12_security_posture.detail: No SECURITY.md. API key printed to stdout on error.

ST-01_subprocess_safety.detail: No subprocess calls. LLM API via openai client. But trust_remote_code=True and pickle.load on checkpoints.

ST-02_test_coverage.detail: Zero test files. No pytest, unittest, or mock imports anywhere.

ST-04_code_structure.detail: Well-organized src/ with single-responsibility modules. Data processing and eval as extension points with factory pattern.

ST-05_code_reuse.detail: Modular design. No copy-paste. But main.py is 42KB — should delegate more.

ST-06_plugin_architecture.detail: Factory pattern for datasets/evaluators. No formal plugin system.

ST-07_credential_handling.detail: API key printed to stdout (S0). Placeholder keys in defaults. W&B key via CLI arg visible in ps output. No .gitignore.

ST-08_path_safety.detail: No validation on data_file paths from CLI. Low risk for local research use.

ST-09_type_safety.detail: Consistent type hints in src/. Partial in top-level scripts. No mypy config.

ST-10_dependency_isolation.detail: 18 deps, 0 pinned. GPU deps not in requirements.txt. Reproducibility risk.

ST-11_error_handling.detail: No bare except clauses. But raw print(e) throughout. 18 try/except in trainer.

ST-12_registry_quality.detail: No registry, no package distribution. Research script only.

ST-13_methodology_docs.detail: README with 30 CLI flags documented. arXiv paper. No architecture doc. No extension guide beyond 4-step README section.

ST-14_scaffolding.detail: No scaffolding. No templates. Shell scripts require manual placeholder editing.

ST-15_monorepo_coordination.detail: N/A — single project, not a monorepo.

absence_patterns.evidence: Zero test files. eval scripts are not tests.
Not abandoned (pushed 3 days ago) but single-author academic repo with no succession plan.

WR-01_stack_compatibility.detail: Python ML stack. Our stack is Node/TS. Concepts portable, code not. PPO/GAE + LLM prompting patterns are language-agnostic.

WR-02_integration_complexity.detail: Not a library. No pip install, no API, no plugin system. 42KB main.py + 102KB trainer.py monoliths. Requires significant decomposition.

WR-03_maintenance_burden.detail: Single author, zero releases, zero tests, no .gitignore. Could be abandoned at any time.

WR-04_lock_in_risk.detail: Apache-2.0. HuggingFace artifacts. Standard ML stack. Easy to fork concepts.

WR-05_value_to_cost.detail: High conceptual value for agent memory research. Novel skill evolution and meta-memory framework. But extracting requires reading the paper — code is a reference implementation, not reusable.

WR-06_ecosystem_maturity.detail: 63-day academic repo. Single author. No community beyond issue questions. No releases.

adoption_assessment.recommendation: Extract concepts only. Read arXiv 2602.02474 for the memory skills framework. Key ideas: meta-memory skills, PPO-driven skill selection, LLM-driven skill evolution from failures. Do not depend on the code.
